tasks.subject: Task 0: busy_timeout in db.connect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Concurrent connections wait up to 5s on a lock instead of failing with 'database is locked'.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/db.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_db.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/db.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_db.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_db.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["busy_timeout=5000 on every connection", "existing db tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: supervisor_config (registry + cadence)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load/validate ~/.agentic/registry.json + pure cadence parsing + due-calculation.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/supervisor_config.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_supervisor_config.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/supervisor_config.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_supervisor_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_supervisor_config.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default_registry_path env override", "load_registry defaults + raises malformed", "parse_cadence grammar+aliases", "is_due logic"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: supervisor_state (ephemeral store)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Small SQLite store for last_run/outcome, heartbeat, runtime pause flags. No durable project data.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/supervisor_state.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_supervisor_state.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/supervisor_state.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_supervisor_state.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_supervisor_state.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["connect_state idempotent", "record_run/get_last_run roundtrip", "heartbeat roundtrip", "pause flags"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: tick_spawn (CLI spawner)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Map tick name to existing CLI argv and spawn against a project graph.db. Never raises.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/tick_spawn.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_tick_spawn.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/tick_spawn.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_tick_spawn.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_tick_spawn.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TICK_COMMANDS only existing CLIs", "spawn_tick env+cwd+injectable runner", "unknown tick ok:false", "runner exception caught"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: scheduler_pass (supervisor core)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure stateless scheduler_pass firing due ticks for enabled/non-paused projects; never raises; injectable now+spawn_fn.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/supervisor.py (scheduler_pass); Test mcp-server/tests/test_supervisor.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/supervisor.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_supervisor.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_supervisor.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fires due tick + records", "skips disabled/paused", "skips not-due", "failure -> errors, never raises"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: control_api (loopback http)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** stdlib http.server on 127.0.0.1: GET /health, GET /projects, POST run-now, POST pause/resume.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/control_api.py; Test mcp-server/tests/test_control_api.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/control_api.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_control_api.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_control_api.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/health + /projects", "pause/resume toggle", "run-now 202 triggers run_fn", "binds 127.0.0.1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: daemon loop + CLI + console script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** run_once/run_forever wiring scheduler+heartbeat+control API; --once mode; agentic-supervisor console script.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/supervisor.py; Modify mcp-server/pyproject.toml; Test mcp-server/tests/test_supervisor_main.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/supervisor.py", "mcp-server/pyproject.toml", "mcp-server/tests/test_supervisor_main.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_supervisor_main.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["run_once fires+beats", "main --once returns 0 + prints JSON", "console script registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Windows keep-alive install script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** install-supervisor.ps1 registering Task Scheduler (logon + restart + ensure-running), -Print dry-run, ASCII-only, parse-clean.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/scripts/install-supervisor.ps1; Test mcp-server/tests/test_install_script.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/scripts/install-supervisor.ps1", "mcp-server/tests/test_install_script.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_install_script.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ASCII-only", "-Print switch + task name", "parse-check clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: full-suite regression + example registry + HANDOFF
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm full fast suite passes; ship example registry.json; smoke-test --once against this repo; HANDOFF note.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/examples/registry.example.json; Modify docs/plans/HANDOFF.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/examples/registry.example.json", "docs/plans/HANDOFF.md"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m \"not llm\" -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full fast suite passes", "example registry exists", "--once smoke run works"]}
```
